# TaskFlow Monitoring Report (Reference)

**Generated by:** `taskflow-monitor.sh`  
**Log source:** `taskflow-workspace/logs/taskflow.log`

## Resource snapshot

| Metric | Tool | Finding |
|--------|------|---------|
| Disk `/` | `df -h` | Within threshold on lab host |
| Memory | `free -h` / Activity Monitor | Baseline captured |
| Processes | `top` / `htop` | gunicorn workers when app running |

## Log analysis

| Level | Count (full log) | Action |
|-------|------------------|--------|
| ERROR | 6 | Investigate db_connection, OOM, deploy_failed |
| WARN | 5 | Review slow_query, disk_usage, cert expiry |

### journalctl (Ubuntu VM)

```bash
sudo journalctl -u taskflow -u nginx --since "1 hour ago"
sudo journalctl -p err -b
```

## Alerts triggered (sample run)

- Application logged `disk_usage percent=88` — aligns with DISK_WARN threshold
- Error burst threshold may fire on last-50-line window during incident simulation

## Week 17 path

Replace script thresholds with Prometheus alert rules:

```yaml
# preview only
- alert: TaskFlowHighErrorRate
  expr: rate(taskflow_log_errors[5m]) > 0.1
```

## Troubleshooting playbook

1. `df -h` / `du -sh /var/log/*` — disk pressure
2. `top` / `htop` — CPU hogs
3. `tail -f` + `grep ERROR` — live errors
4. `journalctl -u taskflow` — service failures
